title: fagelia viscosa
intro: Fagelia viscosa, also known as sticky fagelia, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its sticky leaves and stems. Traditionally, Fagelia viscosa has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Fagelia viscosa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
